name: invoice-processing-agent
description: Processes invoices from email attachments, extracts line items and totals, validates against purchase orders, and routes for manager approval

skills.name: Extract Line Items
skills.description: Extract line items and totals from PDF invoices

skills.name: Match Purchase Order
skills.description: Match invoice against existing purchase orders in the system

skills.name: Route Approval
skills.description: Route to appropriate manager based on amount thresholds and department
